response: This is my first test response

I’m very interested in trying SBLA Beauty because their patented NeoGLOW™ technology promises to target deep vertical neck bands and jawline laxity simultaneously, which most creams completely ignore.
Unlike standard retinols that irritate my sensitive skin, SBLA’s proprietary mineral-based delivery system claims to tighten without peeling or redness, making it worth the investment.
I’ve tried microcurrent devices, but the time commitment is prohibitive—SBLA’s instant-tightening effect for jowls and under-chin areas could give me a “lifting station” result in just 60 seconds.
The before-and-after images of SBLA’s Neck & Jawline Finishing Balm show visible reduction in horizontal neck creases (often called “tech neck”), which is my single biggest aging concern.

I’m very interested because SBLA’s founder came from the wound-healing and post-surgical scarring field, so their approach to dermal remodeling feels more clinically grounded than typical anti-aging brands.

My eyelids have started drooping just enough to make my eye shadow disappear into the crease, and I want that lid space back.
One of my eyelids is noticeably more hooded than the other now, and it makes my face look asymmetrical in every photo.
I'm not ready for a surgical blepharoplasty, but the heaviness on my outer lids is making me look tired even when I've slept ten hours.
